name: Crab Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine white pepper, cayenne, garlic powder, and onion powder; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, melt butter at 200°. Add flour until smooth. Add milk slowly to form cream. Add half the seasoning mix, hard-cooked eggs, and crabmeat; blend together well. Allow to cool.
3. Form into croquettes. In a separate bowl, add remaining seasoning mix and eggs; blend well.
4. Dip croquettes into beaten eggs, then into bread crumbs.
5. Fry until golden brown. Pour over with Cream of Wine Sauce.
